en: Hey, how was the first day?
Oh, excellent! Everyone was so nice. See, it pays to be nice.
ko: 아, 완전 좋았어! 다들 너무 친절했어. 봐, 친절하면 좋은 일이 생기잖아.

en: Another one who wears my shoes. Me? No, I didn't tell anybody that I knew you.
ko: 나랑 같은 처지인 사람이 또 있네. 나? 아니, 너를 안다고 아무한테도 말 안 했어.

en: Well, because, you know, they don't like you.
ko: 음, 왜냐하면 걔네가 너를 안 좋아하거든.

en: What? I thought you said they were nice. Who doesn't like me?
ko: 뭐? 다들 친절하다며. 누가 날 싫어한다는 거야?

en: No, everyone? What are you talking about?
Don't feel bad. You know, they used to like you a lot.
ko: 기분 나빠하지 마. 원래는 너를 많이 좋아했거든.

en: But then you got promoted, and now you're all like, Mr. Bossman.
ko: 그런데 네가 승진하고 나서, 이제 완전 보스맨처럼 굴잖아.

en: You know, Mr. Big. Mr. Big Bossman.
ko: 있잖아, 미스터 빅. 미스터 빅 보스맨.

en: Big? I can't believe it. Yeah, yeah.
ko: 빅? 믿을 수가 없어. 응, 응.

en: They even do that to you?
They do it to me too, you know?
